hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); console.log(d.file_path||d.path||'')"); if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.jsx || "$FILE" == *.json ]]; then cd /Users/pmihaylov/ccode/investo && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); console.log(d.command||'')"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|git push --force|git push -f|vercel --prod|vercel promote'; then echo "BLOCKED: destructive command requires human approval: $CMD" >&2; exit 1; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '\.env[^.]' && echo "$CMD" | grep -qvE 'cat .env.example|echo.*\.env.example'; then echo "BLOCKED: direct .env access requires human approval" >&2; exit 1; fi
